---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report about a bug or mulfunctioning
title: ''
labels: bug, question
assignees: FreddyYJ

---

**Route**
A route name you experiencing a bug or mulfunctioning (e.g., Rapid Transit).

**Locomotive**
A locomotive name you experiencing a bug or mulfunctioning (e.g., DB BR 182).

**Mulfunctioning lever or button**
A lever or button which has a bug (e.g., Reverser Handle).

**Expected behavior**
Expected behavior of the lever or button (e.g., Reverser Handle should be toggle when pressing the button)

**Actual behavior**
Actual behavior of the lever or button (e.g., Inserting handle works fine, but removing it does not work when the handle is already inserted)

**Additional context or description**
Additional description if you have.
